texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CONTRACT RATES OFFER 2025
texts.text: CONTRACT RATES OFFER 2025

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The following are the conditions for the rates to be signed between Enashipai Resort & Spa and Bountiful Safaris. The Company will benefit from the following preferential rates (Single/Double and are in USD)
texts.text: The following are the conditions for the rates to be signed between Enashipai Resort & Spa and Bountiful Safaris. The Company will benefit from the following preferential rates (Single/Double and are in USD)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The rates quoted are: i) Inclusive of 16% VAT, 2% training levy & 7% service charge. ii) Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner (Full Board) iii) Internet connectivity in all rooms iv) The rates are NET
texts.text: The rates quoted are: i) Inclusive of 16% VAT, 2% training levy & 7% service charge. ii) Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner (Full Board) iii) Internet connectivity in all rooms iv) The rates are NET

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: v) Apply only if a bonafide Tours & Safaris Company
texts.text: Apply only if a bonafide Tours & Safaris Company

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a. Group Discounts:
texts.text: Group Discounts:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In addition to above rates, group discounts will be applicable as follows:
texts.text: In addition to above rates, group discounts will be applicable as follows:

texts.text: 20-39 Pax - 5% off applicable contract rates

texts.text: 40-59 Pax - 7% off applicable contract rates

texts.text: 60-79pax - 10% off applicable contract rates

texts.orig: (Group  discounts  are  Net  and  will  not  be  applicable  on  Special  Rates  and  normal  series/block bookings. One free Single bed for 15 paying Pax subject to a maximum of 2 Pax.)

texts.text: CONFERENCE PACKAGE

texts.orig: There is an additional supplement of 50USD per person for conference.
texts.text: There is an additional supplement of 50USD per person for conference.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: SPECIAL REMARKS
texts.text: SPECIAL REMARKS

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Block Bookings and Tour Series
texts.text: Block Bookings and Tour Series

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · For tour series/block bookings where the number of Adults Pax is 7 and above we shall treat this as a group.
texts.text: For tour series/block bookings where the number of Adults Pax is 7 and above we shall treat this as a group.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · For groups utilizing 15 paying Pax per night or more, the 16th bed will be provided on complimentary basis subject to a maximum of 2 beds.
texts.text: For groups utilizing 15 paying Pax per night or more, the 16th bed will be provided on complimentary basis subject to a maximum of 2 beds.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Group Rooming List
texts.text: Group Rooming List

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · A complete rooming list must be provided 14days before arrival.
texts.text: A complete rooming list must be provided 14days before arrival.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Should the above terms not be met, there will be an automatic release.
texts.text: Should the above terms not be met, there will be an automatic release.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. FIT Booking Guarantee
texts.text: FIT Booking Guarantee

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Company credit card number with authorization to run the card, cheque or cash deposited into the Enashipai Resort & Spa account and the deposit slip faxed or emailed scanned copy sent to the Resort reservations at least 7 days before check in.
texts.text: Company credit card number with authorization to run the card, cheque or cash deposited into the Enashipai Resort & Spa account and the deposit slip faxed or emailed scanned copy sent to the Resort reservations at least 7 days before check in.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · If the company does not have a credit card and the reservation is made within 7 days to arrival, the reservation remains tentative i.e. 6pm release. In the instance where the company has credit facilities with Enashipai Resort & Spa, and the account has to be billed back, a voucher has to be sent the reservations within 48 hours of making the booking.
texts.text: If the company does not have a credit card and the reservation is made within 7 days to arrival, the reservation remains tentative i.e. 6pm release. In the instance where the company has credit facilities with Enashipai Resort & Spa, and the account has to be billed back, a voucher has to be sent the reservations within 48 hours of making the booking.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5. Arrival and check-out times
texts.text: Arrival and check-out times

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Daily check-in is from 2.00 pm on expected date of arrival. Check-out is at 10:00am on the date of departure.  Special consideration may be made for extended departure time subject to availability.
texts.text: Daily check-in is from 2.00 pm on expected date of arrival. Check-out is at 10:00am on the date of departure.  Special consideration may be made for extended departure time subject to availability.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CONDITIONS
texts.text: CONDITIONS

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Sales Allotments % Release Period-You are to submit your sales position to the Reservations Executive within 60 days during peak, 50 days during high season and 35 days during low season.
texts.text: Sales Allotments % Release Period-You are to submit your sales position to the Reservations Executive within 60 days during peak, 50 days during high season and 35 days during low season.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Child Policy
texts.text: Child Policy

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For Child(ren) accompanying adult(s) in same room:
texts.text: For Child(ren) accompanying adult(s) in same room:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 0-3years sharing with adults-No Charge
texts.text: 0-3years sharing with adults-No Charge

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 4 years to 12years sharing with 1 or 2 adults- pays 25% of applicable double room rate per child pegged on the season.
texts.text: 4 years to 12years sharing with 1 or 2 adults- pays 25% of applicable double room rate per child pegged on the season.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 4-12-year-old one child in own room is 75% of adult single rate.
texts.text: 4-12-year-old one child in own room is 75% of adult single rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 4-12-year-old two children in their own is 75% of adult double rate.
texts.text: 4-12-year-old two children in their own is 75% of adult double rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 13 years and above is treated as an adult and full rate apply.
texts.text: 13 years and above is treated as an adult and full rate apply.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 3. Tour Leader
texts.text: 3. Tour Leader

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Complimentary accommodation will be granted to Bona Fide Tour Leaders on the basis of 1pax 15 paying Pax, provided it is pre-booked and confirmed. This applies for a maximum of 2 tour leaders.
texts.text: Complimentary accommodation will be granted to Bona Fide Tour Leaders on the basis of 1pax 15 paying Pax, provided it is pre-booked and confirmed. This applies for a maximum of 2 tour leaders.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. Ad Hoc Groups Booking
texts.text: Ad Hoc Groups Booking

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: An Ad Hoc Group Booking is one that is not already charted at our reservation's office as part of your allocations for the year.  For such bookings we will require payment of a 25% non-refundable deposit within 14 days from the confirmation date stamped on your booking voucher by our reservation's office.   Where such a deposit is not received by the 14 th day a notification shall be sent to you after which on the 15 th day the rooms held will be automatically released.  A group is defined seven paying guests travelling together.
texts.text: An Ad Hoc Group Booking is one that is not already charted at our reservation's office as part of your allocations for the year.  For such bookings we will require payment of a 25% non-refundable deposit within 14 days from the confirmation date stamped on your booking voucher by our reservation's office.   Where such a deposit is not received by the 14 th day a notification shall be sent to you after which on the 15 th day the rooms held will be automatically released.  A group is defined seven paying guests travelling together.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5. Applicability: This contract is valid for non-residents only and for leisure business only.  Valid picture Identification will be required at check-in.  These rates are not for onward distribution 3 rd party online travel/hotel booking websites. For non-residential conference contact us for rates.
texts.text: Applicability: This contract is valid for non-residents only and for leisure business only.  Valid picture Identification will be required at check-in.  These rates are not for onward distribution 3 rd party online travel/hotel booking websites. For non-residential conference contact us for rates.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 6. The above rates do not apply to conference delegates whose special rates should be obtained during each conference.
texts.text: The above rates do not apply to conference delegates whose special rates should be obtained during each conference.

texts.text: For Peak season between 60 and 50 days from noon on the date of accommodation

texts.text: a) Payment: (

texts.text: a) Cash

texts.label: text

texts.text: (b) Credit:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: A statement will be raised monthly and payment is due 14 days from the date of statement.  In default, a compound interest of not less than 3% per month will be charged.  Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Enashipai Resort & Spa accounts Department within 14 days of the issue of the invoice. Only the amount in dispute may be deducted from the invoice, and the balance of payment due must be paid within the  specified  time  limit  after  the  complaint  has  been  settled.    Default  of undisputed pay ment may result in the Agent's clients being refused admittance to the Resorts and future confirmed bookings' being released without notice until payment is made and Enashipai Resort & Spa at its discretion may demand payment in advance or terminate this agreement forthwith.  Credit facilities are granted at the entire discretion of Enashipai Resort & Spa and may be withdrawn without notice.
texts.text: A statement will be raised monthly and payment is due 14 days from the date of statement.  In default, a compound interest of not less than 3% per month will be charged.  Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Enashipai Resort & Spa accounts Department within 14 days of the issue of the invoice. Only the amount in dispute may be deducted from the invoice, and the balance of payment due must be paid within the  specified  time  limit  after  the  complaint  has  been  settled.    Default  of undisputed pay ment may result in the Agent's clients being refused admittance to the Resorts and future confirmed bookings' being released without notice until payment is made and Enashipai Resort & Spa at its discretion may demand payment in advance or terminate this agreement forthwith.  Credit facilities are granted at the entire discretion of Enashipai Resort & Spa and may be withdrawn without notice.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: b) Returned Cheques: Should a cheque issued by the agent be returned by the bank for any reason, the agent shall replace the cheque within forty-eight (48) hours with certified funds.  Additionally, the Agent shall pay the Returned Cheque Fee charged by the bank.  Failure to replace the returned cheques will constitute a default of this agreement.
texts.text: b) Returned Cheques: Should a cheque issued by the agent be returned by the bank for any reason, the agent shall replace the cheque within forty-eight (48) hours with certified funds.  Additionally, the Agent shall pay the Returned Cheque Fee charged by the bank.  Failure to replace the returned cheques will constitute a default of this agreement.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The present offer does not constitute a credit facility.
texts.text: The present offer does not constitute a credit facility.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 9. Variation in rates, and/or taxes and/or service charge
texts.text: Variation in rates, and/or taxes and/or service charge

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Enashipai Resort and Spa may at its discretion, by not less than one month's notice in writing to the Operator alter the contracted rates.  In the event of any appreciation of the Kenya shilling of over 5% vis-à-vis the currency in which the contract is drawn or any changes in government taxes, training levy or service charge, Enashipai Resort and Spa reserves the right to adjust these rates accordingly, from the date of such changes and/or any variations.
texts.text: Enashipai Resort and Spa may at its discretion, by not less than one month's notice in writing to the Operator alter the contracted rates.  In the event of any appreciation of the Kenya shilling of over 5% vis-à-vis the currency in which the contract is drawn or any changes in government taxes, training levy or service charge, Enashipai Resort and Spa reserves the right to adjust these rates accordingly, from the date of such changes and/or any variations.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 10. Duration
texts.text: 10. Duration

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The above rates are offered to the Company by the Resort to apply from the date of this letter until 31 st December 2025 subject to availability. The rates will NOT apply over blocked-out dates arising from, normal repair and maintenance work on rooms, International Conference, Incentive groups or special events. The Resort will endeavor to communicate such dates in advance to the company.   The present offer is not retroactive.
texts.text: The above rates are offered to the Company by the Resort to apply from the date of this letter until 31 st December 2025 subject to availability. The rates will NOT apply over blocked-out dates arising from, normal repair and maintenance work on rooms, International Conference, Incentive groups or special events. The Resort will endeavor to communicate such dates in advance to the company.   The present offer is not retroactive.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 11. Christmas & Easter Supplements -minimum stay 3 nights
texts.text: 11. Christmas & Easter Supplements -minimum stay 3 nights

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The rates are not applicable during holiday seasons (Christmas-23 rd Dec to 1 st Jan 2026 and Easter). A supplement of USD.50 per person is applicable on the contracted rate and 50% of the supplement for children above 3 years will be applicable.
texts.text: The rates are not applicable during holiday seasons (Christmas-23 rd Dec to 1 st Jan 2026 and Easter). A supplement of USD.50 per person is applicable on the contracted rate and 50% of the supplement for children above 3 years will be applicable.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 12. Reservation
texts.text: 12. Reservation

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Resort recommends that advance reservations be made in order to ensure availability on check-in and other arrival procedures. The offer does not guarantee the availability of rooms but any request during  heavily  booked  periods  will  be  treated  with  priority.  Official  company  voucher  or  LPO  duly approved must support all reservations made.
texts.text: The Resort recommends that advance reservations be made in order to ensure availability on check-in and other arrival procedures. The offer does not guarantee the availability of rooms but any request during  heavily  booked  periods  will  be  treated  with  priority.  Official  company  voucher  or  LPO  duly approved must support all reservations made.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 13. Changes to Offer
texts.text: 13. Changes to Offer

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This offer can only be changed or terminated in writing by giving a 30 days' notice .  In  case of force majeure or in the event of additional taxes and levies imposed by the Government, the Resort reserves the right to amend the rates accordingly.
texts.text: This offer can only be changed or terminated in writing by giving a 30 days' notice .  In  case of force majeure or in the event of additional taxes and levies imposed by the Government, the Resort reserves the right to amend the rates accordingly.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 14. Disclaimer
texts.text: 14. Disclaimer

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the event of any act over which the Resort has no control (which shall include any directive from the Government of Kenya) preventing the Resort from complying in whole or part with its obligations under this offer, then the Resort shall be exonerate from liability whilst such event(s) pertain.  However, the Resort will endeavor to make all reasonable efforts to find alternative accommodation.
texts.text: In the event of any act over which the Resort has no control (which shall include any directive from the Government of Kenya) preventing the Resort from complying in whole or part with its obligations under this offer, then the Resort shall be exonerate from liability whilst such event(s) pertain.  However, the Resort will endeavor to make all reasonable efforts to find alternative accommodation.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 15. Authority
texts.text: 15. Authority

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The person executing this contract on behalf of Enashipai Resort & Spa represents and warrants that he/she has authority to do so on behalf of the company, and has read and understood the terms and conditions herein; hence assumes responsibility for all dealings between the Company and the Resort.
texts.text: The person executing this contract on behalf of Enashipai Resort & Spa represents and warrants that he/she has authority to do so on behalf of the company, and has read and understood the terms and conditions herein; hence assumes responsibility for all dealings between the Company and the Resort.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 16. Confidentiality
texts.text: 16. Confidentiality

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Operator confirms and agrees that this Agreement is confidential to the Operator and Enashipai Resort  and  Spa  and  the  Operator  shall  not  in  any  circumstances  divulge  or  permit  to  divulge  this agreement or its contents to any other person.
texts.text: The Operator confirms and agrees that this Agreement is confidential to the Operator and Enashipai Resort  and  Spa  and  the  Operator  shall  not  in  any  circumstances  divulge  or  permit  to  divulge  this agreement or its contents to any other person.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 17. Miscellaneous
texts.text: 17. Miscellaneous

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Amendments to this agreement shall be valid only if made in writing and signed by the Operators and Enashipai Resort and Spa.  The waiver of any of the terms on any occasion shall not be deemed a waiver of such terms and conditions for any further occasion.  All notices to be served shall be sent to the address of the party to be served as specified herein. This agreement shall be governed by the laws of the Kenya.
texts.text: Amendments to this agreement shall be valid only if made in writing and signed by the Operators and Enashipai Resort and Spa.  The waiver of any of the terms on any occasion shall not be deemed a waiver of such terms and conditions for any further occasion.  All notices to be served shall be sent to the address of the party to be served as specified herein. This agreement shall be governed by the laws of the Kenya.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 18. Evaluation
texts.text: 18. Evaluation

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Towards the end of each calendar year, the volume of business of each Company will be evaluated in comparison to the expected number of Room Nights produced.  The Company will not be liable for any shortfall in business volume, however, the Resort reserves the right not to renew the present offer and/or to do so based on the lower volume, for preferential STO rate the following year.
texts.text: Towards the end of each calendar year, the volume of business of each Company will be evaluated in comparison to the expected number of Room Nights produced.  The Company will not be liable for any shortfall in business volume, however, the Resort reserves the right not to renew the present offer and/or to do so based on the lower volume, for preferential STO rate the following year.
